raw_consumer_statement: I made a booking for XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/2023 through a fraudulent website called XXXX. I had immediately called the hotel after the booking to find out that XXXX had no authority to sell reservations and that it was a fraud company. I immediately called Citi Mastercard and the fraud department told me to file a fraud case to get my money back. I sent in a letter from the hotel stating it was fraud. The case took over 2 months and I got a letter stating that the case was opened up incorrectly by them and that it should have been a billing dispute not a fraud case because I did actually give them my credit card info. So a new billing dispute was opened up and I resent all the information I had from the hotel stating it was not a real reservation. 2 months go by because they never opened up any of the supporting documents I sent. I called and they finally agreed to open the emails and added them to my file. Then they sent me some random statement they wanted me to sign which I did so on XXXX XXXX and emailed it but again they did not add it to the file. On XXXX XXXX they closed my case stating it had been too long and they will not reopen it. IT WAS TOO LONG BECAUSE THEY MISHANDLED THE CASE FROM DAY 1. I AM NOT RESPONISIBLE FOR THIS BOGUS CHARGE. THEY HAD EVERYTHING THEY NEEDED TO GIVE ME BACK MY MONEY BUT THEY REFUSE. IT IS ABSOLUTE INCOMPETENCE.
